response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, notable open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or direct enterprise GenAI deployment — key requirements for a Staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experienced in agentic workflows and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong full-stack proficiency with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud tooling (AWS CDK)
Proven track record of open-source leadership and technical mentoring
concerns: No explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures in professional context
Career gap since Oct 2025 raises questions about current technical engagement
Limited evidence of leading technical discovery sessions or enterprise AI production deployments
